title: Media Plan Artifact
description: Layout-aware media plan derived from theme_rules (Phase 10). Replaces the fixed 5-shot taxonomy with section-driven, priority-ordered shot selection. Each planned shot has a source section, priority, and intended usage. Consumed by build-media-assets to drive generation.

derived_from_theme_rules.description: True when shot plan was derived from theme_rules. False when using the 5-shot fallback taxonomy.

store_pattern.description: The store pattern from theme_rules.store_pattern that drove shot selection. Null when using fallback.

section_coverage.description: Which sections from the homepage section stack need media, and which shot types they require.

section_order.description: Display order of this section in the homepage layout.

shots_needed.description: Shot type IDs required by this section.

shot_plan.description: Deduplicated, priority-ordered list of shots to produce. Each entry is unique by shot_type.

source_section.description: The section that drove this shot's inclusion (e.g. 'hero', 'featured-collection', 'baseline', 'fallback').

required.description: Whether this shot is required by the layout. Required shots are always generated in full_generation mode.

priority.description: Generation priority. high = first, medium = second, low = last (and skipped in cost-constrained modes).

intended_usage.description: Human-readable description of where this image will be used in the layout.

aspect_ratio.description: Required aspect ratio for this shot type in this layout context.

total_shot_types.description: Total unique shot types in the plan.

required_shots.description: Number of required shots in the plan.

optional_shots.description: Number of optional shots in the plan.
